title: After the Arima Kinen: Magic that Changed the Future

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She gives the race her all and the crowd is left
quivering with excitement after the intense bout.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With her peers utterly engrossed by Sweep
Tosho, Tokai Teio looks on with a slightly
frustrated, but ultimately happy expression.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She even praises Sweep Tosho's running,
acknowledging that it truly excited the audience.
